mdRecord.dcterms:title: Church Meeting Postcard
mdRecord.dcterms:description: 1275_Laurel Branch Church Meeting Postcard; Elder Michael Reed and wife Molly Ellen Akers, Cecil Reed and Clarice Hylton (center), Carsie married Elder Luther Bowman (top left), Ella married John R. Poff (on right). First on right, bottom row "Haskew" - his mother Lula is in picture somewhere.
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
